_README: Run spec template. Copy to config.json (or pass --config). Every example-specific fact lives here; the SKILL + tools are generic. Remove the _comment_* keys before use (JSON has no comments).
name: my_use_case
_comment_target: Define the 0/1 outcome ONE of three ways: existing column, non-null-of-a-column, or value-equals.
_comment_direction: 'suppression' = find LOW-rate segments (e.g. non-responders to drop). 'targeting' = find HIGH-rate segments (e.g. best prospects).
_comment_columns: id_columns + exclude_columns are never used as features. Put POST-OUTCOME / leakage fields in exclude (anything known only after the outcome). feature_columns=null => auto-select numeric + low-cardinality columns.
_comment_time: Optional. A time/cohort column used to validate stability of each segment across periods.
_comment_missing: Numeric sentinel codes to treat as missing (NaN). Read these from the data dictionary; keep legitimate 'max valid' caps OUT of this list.
